name: claude-code-vision
description: A macOS menu bar vision proxy for Claude Code and cc-switch.

scripts.check:node: node --check src/proxy.mjs && node --check src/service/cli.mjs && node --check src/service/controller.mjs && node --check scripts/package-windows-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/package-windows-portable.mjs && node --test
scripts.check: npm run check:node && bash -n scripts/visionctl.sh && bash -n scripts/install.sh && bash -n scripts/build-app.sh && bash -n scripts/package-dmg.sh
